description: QuantMail production backend - expand from Phase 3 identity service with full email CRUD, threading, folders, AI-powered features (summarize, compose, priority, phishing), contact management, and attachment handling. Uses Prisma EmailRepository, MailAIService from @quant/ai, and server-core Fastify pattern.
steps: Create apps/quantmail/backend/ directory structure: app.ts, routes/, services/, __tests__/
Create apps/quantmail/backend/app.ts: Fastify app using createApp from @quant/server-core. Register email routes, folder routes, contact routes, ai routes. Follow the api-v2/app.ts config pattern.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/email.service.ts: EmailService class wrapping EmailRepository. Methods: compose(userId, draft), send(userId, emailId), receive(userId, emailData), getEmail(emailId, userId), listByFolder(userId, folderId, pagination), moveToFolder(emailId, folderId), archive(emailId), delete(emailId, soft/hard), markRead(emailId), markStarred(emailId), search(userId, query).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/thread.service.ts: ThreadService - getThread(threadId, userId) returns emails in conversation view, listThreads(userId, folderId, pagination), getThreadParticipants(threadId). Groups emails by threadId with unread counts.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/folder.service.ts: FolderService - createFolder(userId, name, type), listFolders(userId), updateFolder(folderId, data), deleteFolder(folderId), getFolderStats(folderId). Includes default folder initialization (inbox, sent, drafts, trash, spam, archive).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-email.service.ts: AIEmailService wrapping MailAIService from @quant/ai. Methods: summarize(emailId, userId), composeAssistant(userId, instructions, context), classifyPriority(emailId, userId), detectPhishing(emailId, userId), suggestReplies(emailId, userId). Each method fetches the email from DB then calls the appropriate MailAIService method.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/contact.service.ts: ContactService - addContact(userId, contact), getContacts(userId, pagination), searchContacts(userId, query) for autocomplete, updateContact(contactId, data), deleteContact(contactId). Contact data: name, email, avatar, frequency of communication.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/attachment.service.ts: AttachmentService - generateUploadUrl(userId, filename, contentType, size) returns presigned URL, getAttachment(attachmentId), deleteAttachment(attachmentId). Size validation (max 25MB).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/routes/emails.ts: Fastify route plugin - POST /emails (compose/send), GET /emails, GET /emails/:id, PUT /emails/:id, DELETE /emails/:id, POST /emails/:id/read, POST /emails/:id/star, POST /emails/:id/move. Zod validation.
Create apps/quantmail/backend/routes/threads.ts: Fastify route plugin - GET /threads, GET /threads/:id.
Create apps/quantmail/backend/routes/folders.ts: Fastify route plugin - POST /folders, GET /folders, PUT /folders/:id, DELETE /folders/:id.
Create apps/quantmail/backend/routes/contacts.ts: Fastify route plugin - POST /contacts, GET /contacts, GET /contacts/search, PUT /contacts/:id, DELETE /contacts/:id.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/routes/ai.ts: Fastify route plugin - POST /emails/:id/summarize, POST /emails/compose-assist, POST /emails/:id/classify-priority, POST /emails/:id/detect-phishing, GET /emails/:id/reply-suggestions.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/__tests__/email.service.test.ts: Unit tests - compose creates draft, send moves to sent folder and sets sentAt, receive creates email in inbox, moveToFolder updates folderId, delete soft-deletes, search filters by query.
Create apps/quantmail/backend/__tests__/folder.service.test.ts: Unit tests - createFolder validates unique name, listFolders returns with counts, default folder initialization.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/__tests__/ai-email.service.test.ts: Unit tests - summarize calls MailAIService.summarizeEmail with email content, classifyPriority returns high/normal/low, detectPhishing returns structured result.
Update apps/quantmail/tsconfig.json: add backend/**/*.ts to include
acceptance_criteria: EmailService.send moves email to sent folder, sets sentAt, and would trigger notification
ThreadService.getThread returns grouped emails in chronological order with unread count
FolderService.createFolder prevents duplicate names per user
AIEmailService.summarize fetches email then delegates to MailAIService
All tests pass: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx vitest run apps/quantmail/backend/__tests__/
TypeScript compiles cleanly: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx tsc --noEmit -p apps/quantmail/tsconfig.json
verification: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx vitest run apps/quantmail/backend/__tests__/
